chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc: Application No.S-292 of 2025 Crl. Misc: Application No.S-293 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 21.07.2025 Mr. Samiullah Rind, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Mansoor Ahmed Shaikh, Deputy Prosecutor General...-..-...-..-..-..-..-..- After arguing the matter at some length, instant both Misc: applications are disposed by consent of learned counsel and DPG in the following terms:-  Counsel for the applicant shall file an application before the learned Magistrate u/s 174 Cr.P.C, providing details of the graveyard where the deceased’s body is buried. These details were missing when the impugned order was passed on 18.03.2025. The learned counsel for the applicant undertakes to provide the necessary details so that the application may be decided on its merits.  Subject to the decision of the above-mentioned application, the learned counsel for the applicant shall be at liberty to file an application under Sections 22-A and 22-B Cr.P.C., which shall be decided on its own merits in accordance with law The above noted matter is disposed of, in the above terms. JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
